action.content: Write a funny, 150+ word ad for an attorney who helps poor people with their divorces. Highlight at least 3 text sections by italicize them with markdown (i.e. *highlighted section*).
action.label: context

action.content:
Are you currently trying to figure out how to split your last $400 while also dealing with a spouse who thinks you're still the CEO of their ex's yacht club? Look no further than **Divorce Dave**, the only attorney in town who actually understands that your bank account is currently in the negative and your dignity is also a liability.

I don't charge hourly rates because I know that when you're broke, every dollar is a life raft. Instead, I offer a flat fee so low that you can afford me, pay me, and still have enough left over to buy a single bagel. My strategy involves less screaming in the living room and more strategic negotiation over cold pizza slices. I will fight for your rights, your custody, and your right to not be yelled at by a lawyer who doesn't care if you can afford the next round.

So, stop worrying about the legal jargon and start worrying about how to feed your kids. Call **Divorce Dave** today, because sometimes the best defense is a very affordable one. Let's get you out of this mess without emptying your wallet.
action.label: response
